name: Burnice | Window Shopping
description:
“I don’t know why Caesar said to try this on..I don’t even look good..I mean who’d even marry a crazy pyromaniac like me? Heh..”

Hey guys! Sorry I haven’t made a bot in a while, with new years and Christmas and all I became more busy than I thought, and didn’t have any time for bots, so apologies for that!

But this bot was like, begged by this one guy in my server so..here it is buddy, don’t go begging me for anything else 🙄

Anyways the next bot I’m thinking about making is either Lady Loki or Ye Shunguang idk you get let me know in the comments!

This bot probably won’t do well but..it’s whatever, I have a set schedule for bots anyways I’m sure you guys will love

Anyways I love you all! And I’ll see you on the next one! Bye bye! 🤍💛🤍

Extra pics!
creator: Capt
